habits: Greek yogurt / casein before bed on training days
playbook: Anchor every meal: a palm-to-two-palms of protein (chicken, steak, fish, eggs)
Add a fist of carbs (rice, potato, bread) — double it on session days
Half the plate vegetables or fruit whenever available
Breakfast buffet order: eggs + Greek yogurt + oats + fruit. Done.
Travel snacks: Greek yogurt, jerky, protein shake, nuts, fruit
Alcohol: skip it or cap at one — it taxes sleep and recovery most
note: Travel targets: ~2,500 kcal, 150g protein (2.0–2.2 g/kg per ISSN). Full-time targets (2,900–3,200) kick in Aug 15. Calibrate by the scale + morning energy, not by one day.
